arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold, the grass is not always greener - I should know after my Liverpool exit
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has yet to ink a renewal amid transfer links with Real Madrid, who can speak to him about a move from January as things stand.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk insists 1+1 does not equal two in Liverpool contract situation – Answers question despite club ban
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk has insisted there is nothing to report on current contract negotiations with Liverpool, despite reports to the contrary and suggestions a deal could be around the corner. Soccer News cover comments from the Liverpool captain today made in an interview with Viaplay, during which he was asked about his contract situation at The post Virgil van Dijk insists 1+1 does not equal two in Liverpool contract situation – Answers question despite club ban appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Team News: Liverpool vs. Manchester City injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Liverpool and Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Man City should target cut-price transfer alternative if they can't solve glaring problem
arts.sum: Manchester City transfer news as right back solution emerges

arts.ttl: Real Madrid boss Carlo Ancelotti responds to Kylian Mbappe criticism after Liverpool defeat
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe has been the centre of talk this week after missing a penalty in Real Madrid's Champions League defeat to Liverpool on Merseyside

arts.ttl: How Champions League table stands - Real, PSG & Man City in trouble?
arts.sum: With three games to go in the revamped Champions League's new 36-team league phase, who is on track to progress and who could be in danger?

arts.ttl: Guardiola will not 'run away' from Man City problems
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola says he has no plans to "run away" from the difficult time his team are facing. City travel to Liverpool on Sunday, trailing the Premier League leaders by eight points.

arts.ttl: Former Man City and Liverpool star offers theory behind Pep Guardiola's struggles
arts.sum: Manchester City have lost three Premier League matches on the spin as they prepare to travel to Anfield, where league leaders Liverpool have a chance to open up an 11-point gap

arts.ttl: Two Liverpool stars return from injury as son of Premier League hero scores on full debut
arts.sum: Jayden Danns and James McConnell both made their returns from injury as Liverpool Under-21s drew away at Reading on Saturday

arts.ttl: “Not something historic” – Journalist pours cold water on Feyenoord, unimpressed by Manchester City
arts.sum: If there’s any media in the world that likes a moan, and has the analysts to do it, it’s probably the Dutch media. Willem van Henegem’s reaction to Feyenoord’s draw with Manchester City this week can stand as testament to that.
